# Load the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-DGiwXQZZBaaWx6rY9YuKEV-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = text  # already loaded
# Find all quoted substrings between double quotes "
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    indices.append((i, j))
    start = j+1
indices, [text[i+1:j] for i,j in indices]

# Find all content in parentheses ()
paren_indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('(', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find(')', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    paren_indices.append((i, j))
    start = j+1

len(paren_indices), paren_indices[:10], [text[i+1:j] for i,j in paren_indices[:10]]

# Helper to find all occurrences of a substring
def find_all(text, sub):
    res = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(sub, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        res.append(i)
        start = i + 1
    return res

subs = [
    "لَقَدْ كَفَرَ الَّذِينَ قَالُوا",
    "وَإِذۡ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ",
    "أأنتَ يا عيسى قلتَ للناس اجعلوني أنا وأمذ] إلَهين، من دون الله؟",
    "في الأحاديث الشريفة سينزل",
    "سينزل في آخر الزمان ليكسر الصليب",
]
positions = {s: find_all(text, s) for s in subs}
positions

start_laqad = positions['لَقَدْ كَفَرَ الَّذِينَ قَالُوا'][0]
# Find the next bracket "[" after start, to limit; but let's find 'جَمِيعًا'
end_phrase = "جَمِيعًا"
end_index = text.find(end_phrase, start_laqad)
start_laqad, end_index, text[start_laqad:end_index+len(end_phrase)]
len("جَمِيعًا")

paren1 = (2229, 2312)
paren1_content = text[paren1[0]+1:paren1[1]]
paren1_content, repr(paren1_content)[:200]

idx_ellipsis = paren1_content.rfind("...")
idx_ellipsis, paren1_content[:idx_ellipsis], paren1_content[idx_ellipsis:idx_ellipsis+3]

start = 2230
end = 2309
text[start:end]

paraphrase = "أأنتَ يا عيسى قلتَ للناس اجعلوني أنا وأمذ] إلَهين، من دون الله؟"
start = text.find(paraphrase)
start, paraphrase

# Find index of the question mark
qm_idx = start + paraphrase.rfind("؟")
# But rfind returns index within string; let's compute globally:
qm_within = paraphrase.rfind("؟")
qm_global = start + qm_within
start, qm_within, qm_global, text[start:qm_global]

start_phrase = positions["سينزل في آخر الزمان ليكسر الصليب"][0]
context = text[start_phrase:start_phrase+200]
context

start_matn = positions["سينزل في آخر الزمان ليكسر الصليب"][0]
end_matn = text.find(" فبالتأكيد", start_matn)
start_matn, end_matn, text[start_matn:end_matn]

for kw in ["حديث", "الأحاديث", "قال رسول", "في الحديث", "روي عن النبي", "عن النبي", "عن رسول الله"]:
    print(kw, find_all(text, kw))

phrase2 = "صَيِّروني وأمي معبودَيْن من دون الله؟"
start2 = text.find(phrase2)
start2, text[start2-30:start2+len(phrase2)+10]

start2 = 2103
end2 = start2 + len(phrase2) - 1  # exclude the final question mark
text[start2:end2]

# recompute end2 numeric
phrase2 = "صَيِّروني وأمي معبودَيْن من دون الله؟"
start2 = 2103
end2 = start2 + len(phrase2) - 1
start2, end2

spans = []

# A
spans.append((64, 143, "Ayah"))
# B
spans.append((176, 405, "Ayah"))
# C
spans.append((634, 1242, "Ayah"))
# D paraphrase question
spans.append((1788, 1850, "Ayah"))
# E partial ayah without ellipsis
spans.append((2230, 2309, "Ayah"))
# F paraphrase "صَيِّروني..." - treat as Ayah paraphrase
spans.append((2103, 2139, "Ayah"))
# G parenthesized 'وَإِذۡ قَالَ'
spans.append((2347, 2472, "Ayah"))
# K hadith paraphrase
spans.append((2836, 2938, "Hadith"))
# H parenthesized aeanta second time
spans.append((3078, 3157, "Ayah"))
# I 'لَقَدْ كَفَرَ ... جَمِيعًا'
spans.append((3452, 3663, "Ayah"))
# J 'وَإِذۡ قَالَ ...' inside quotes parentheses
spans.append((3823, 3948, "Ayah"))

# Validate spans: print texts
for s,e,t in spans:
    print(t, s, e, repr(text[s:e]))

sorted_spans = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x[0])
sorted_spans
